description: Blow up features.ts (currently ~300 lines, does terrain/imagery/contours/labels) into a features/ directory — one file per layer. Implement a layer registry pattern where each layer self-registers with a common interface (id, name, init, show, hide, destroy). Slim AppState to { exaggeration: 1|EXAGGERATION_SCALE, layers: Record<LayerId, boolean> }. Renderer becomes a thin orchestrator. UI holds zero rendering knowledge. This is the foundational task that makes all future layer additions trivial — one new file = one new layer. Files: features/terrain.ts, features/imagery.ts, features/contours.ts, features/labels.ts, features/registry.ts (or similar).
title: Architecture refactor: layer registry + features/ directory
